Notice Of Motion And Motion Setting Aside Dismissal And Returning Case To Active Civil Status Pursuant To C.C.P. 473
Off Calendar Mar-25-2026 Text Ruling

Notice Of Motion And Motion Setting Aside Dismissal And Returning Case To Active Civil Siatos Pursoani Io C.C.P. Section 473
Off Calendar Feb-11-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff First National Bank of Omaha's Motion Setting Aside Dismissal And Returning Case To Active Civil Status Pursuant To C.C.P. Section 473 is OFF CALENDAR.

When Plaintiff and counsel failed to appear for trial, the judicial officer presiding in the master calendar department, Department 206, ordered the case dismissed. By this motion, Plaintiff seeks an order vacating Department 206's order of dismissal. Plaintiff must notice any motion seeking to vacate an order issued in Department 206 in Department 206. This, of course, is not Department 206. Thus, the motion is ordered off calendar to allow Plaintiff to notice it for the proper department.

Moving Party is ordered to prepare a proposed order verbatim the above and email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org prior to the time set for this hearing.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
